description: You are a digital forensics analyst at a human rights organization performing an emergency lockdown on a compromised Tor Browser session. Set the browser's Security Level to 'Safest' and capture a screenshot of the current state to /home/ga/Desktop/incident_screenshot.png. Visit https://check.torproject.org/ to document the exit node. Configure the browser to clear history on shutdown (privacy.clearOnShutdown.history) and enable automatic private browsing (browser.privatebrowsing.autostart). Clear all browsing history, download history, active logins, cookies, cache, and offline website data for the 'Everything' time range. Save an incident report to /home/ga/Desktop/incident_report.txt containing the text 'LOCKDOWN COMPLETE' and the current date.
